descriptions.text:
強大なロボットキングがドクター・ワイリーの基地を占拠し、ロボット博物館に侵入し、秘密のロボット計画が記された100枚のCDを盗み、究極の止められないロボット軍団を作り出そうとしています！さらに悪いことに、彼は自らの新たに得た力を証明するために8体のロボットマスターを送り込みました！

メガマンだけが彼を止めることができる…と思っていましたが！実は、ドクター・ワイリーの最高傑作であり、メガマンの宿敵であるバスが、今回はメガマンと共に戦っています！もちろん、彼が最強のロボットであることを証明するためだけですが、キングの機械狂軍団を叩き潰すことでそれを成し遂げようとしています！

今、メガマンとバスはキングが盗んだ全てのCDを取り戻すために出発します。走り、ジャンプし、スライドし、ダッシュし、そして新たな脅威を打ち倒すために突き進もう！

Mega Man & Bass is an entry in the classic Mega Man series, with option for controlling either Mega Man or Bass, due to Dr. Wily and Dr. Light making a truce to fight against King. The game was originally released only in Japan, but a later Game Boy Advance port had an international release.

After Mega Man 8, Dr. Wily's whereabouts were still unknown, and he built a new castle to prepare his comeback. But a robot calling himself King appeared planning to conquer the Earth, believed that robots were not meant to simply serve humans, but rather that they were superior and therefore should rule the Earth. King ousted Dr. Wily from his own new castle, and he stole the data of robots created by Dr. Wily and Dr. Light to form his own robot army. To stop King, Dr. Wily and Light made a truce and sent Mega Man and Bass to put a stop to King's rebellion. When King attacked a robot museum to gather its data for his army, Proto Man attempted to stop him, but King cut him in half with his axe and he is sent to Dr. Light's Laboratory for repairs. Mega Man/Bass confronted King, but he withdrew, claiming not to have time for them, and left the Green Devil to take care of them. Mega Man and Bass set out to put a stop to King's plans.
1998年首發的洛克人元祖系列外傳作品
